# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
  routes:
  - match:
      pathRegex: /api/.*
    action:
      destination:
        service: api-gateway.production.svc.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: user-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - kind: Service
      name: api-gateway
      namespace: production
    - kind: Service
      name: order-service
      namespace: production
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: order-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - kind: Service
      name: api-gateway
      namespace: production
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: api-gateway
  rules:
  - from:
    - kind: Service
      name: user-service
      namespace: production
    - kind: Service
      name: order-service
      namespace: production
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
